text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oohh! TYSM! Can't believe you remembered. I
feel so seen! The b-day vibes are on point!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Well, I'm giving you more than just b-day
vibes today. I also wanted to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When I'm with you, I can just chill, let go, and run
free.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's stay the Runaway Besties forever, okay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Omg, why you gotta make my heart explode?
Same though, Runaway Besties for life!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to go full send and run from those
fiery feels of yours!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...No, you're supposed to catch the feels, not dodge them.
